case_title: ANN SHAMMAS et al VS. SAN FRANCISCO REAL PROPERTY 17B, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. SERVICE IS WAIVED ON CLAIM AND CROSS-CLAIM IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S.VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
